parameters.query:
WITH ranked AS (
  SELECT p.title, c.name competitor, ph.observed_at, ph.price,
         LAG(ph.price) OVER (PARTITION BY ph.product_id ORDER BY ph.observed_at) AS prev_price
  FROM price_history ph
  JOIN products p ON p.id = ph.product_id
  JOIN competitors c ON c.id = p.competitor_id
  WHERE ph.observed_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
)
SELECT title, competitor, price, prev_price,
       ROUND(((price - prev_price)/NULLIF(prev_price,0))::numeric*100,2) AS pct_change
FROM ranked
WHERE prev_price IS NOT NULL
  AND ABS((price - prev_price)/NULLIF(prev_price,0)) >= 0.1
ORDER BY ABS((price - prev_price)/NULLIF(prev_price,0)) DESC
LIMIT 20;

nodes.name: Prepare AI Prompt
nodes.query:
WITH ranked AS (
  SELECT p.title, c.name competitor, ph.observed_at, ph.price,
         LAG(ph.price) OVER (PARTITION BY ph.product_id ORDER BY ph.observed_at) prev_price
  FROM price_history ph
  JOIN products p ON p.id = ph.product_id
  JOIN competitors c ON c.id = p.competitor_id
  WHERE ph.observed_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
)
SELECT title, competitor, price, prev_price,
       ROUND(((price - prev_price)/NULLIF(prev_price,0))::numeric*100,2) AS pct_change
FROM ranked
WHERE prev_price IS NOT NULL
  AND ABS((price - prev_price)/NULLIF(prev_price,0)) >= 0.1
ORDER BY ABS((price - prev_price)/NULLIF(prev_price,0)) DESC
LIMIT 20;
